title: tf.math.floormod  |  TensorFlow v2.16.1
description:
Returns element-wise remainder of division.

tf.math.mod

parameters.name: floor(x / y) * y + floormod(x, y) = x
parameters.description:
This follows Python semantics in that the
result here is consistent with a flooring divide. E.g., regardless of the signs of x and y.
